subjects.description: African penguin waddling confidently along a sandy beach at sunset.
subjects.appearance_details: Distinct black and white feathers, compact body, dark flipper like wings, short legs, pale face markings, warm rim light along its silhouette.
subjects.relationship: Single main penguin subject moving through a coastal sunset scene while seagulls and waves add background life.
subjects.location: Foreground center on sandy beach dotted with small pebbles and shells, ocean waves behind.
subjects.relative_size: Medium in the frame, prominent against the orange sky and shoreline.
subjects.orientation: Facing forward with a slight angle toward camera left as it waddles along the beach.
subjects.pose: Upright waddling posture with flippers held slightly away from its body for balance.
subjects.action: Waddles confidently across the sand while waves roll in behind it.
subjects.state_changes: Starts moving from the shoreline, continues with rhythmic side to side steps, ends silhouetted more strongly against the golden sky.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Dense black and white feather texture with slight damp sheen, dark exposed skin around beak and feet.
subjects.facial_features: Dark eyes, pointed beak, white facial patches, black cap markings.

background_setting: Sandy beach at sunset with orange sky, gentle ocean waves, scattered pebbles and shells, and seagulls flying overhead in the coastal air.

lighting.conditions: Warm golden sunset backlight, orange sky glow, soft reflections on wet sand, slight silhouette edge around the penguin.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm golden sunset backlight, orange sky glow, soft reflections on wet sand, slight silhouette edge around the penguin.

aesthetics.composition: Coastal, warm, serene, charming, confident wildlife moment, soothing beach atmosphere.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Coastal, warm, serene, charming, confident wildlife moment, soothing beach atmosphere.

cinematography.camera_motion: Low tracking shot at penguin height, medium framing, camera glides backward as the penguin waddles toward it, ocean horizon kept soft behind.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Realistic text to video coastal wildlife scene with natural animal motion and surf detail.
artistic_style: Cinematic natural realism with warm sunset palette and gentle silhouette contrast.
context: An African penguin crosses a peaceful beach at sunset while waves and seagulls define the coastal setting.

actions.description: The penguin steps onto the sandy foreground as sunset light outlines its black and white feathers.
It waddles confidently past pebbles and shells while seagulls glide overhead and waves roll behind.
The penguin continues forward in a warm silhouette against the orange sky as foam reaches the shore.
